findings.location: index: s2, s3, s4, s5, s6
findings.description: `SqlResultSet` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the code examples of sections s2, s3, s4, s5, and s6, but is absent from the hints of all five sections.
findings.source_evidence: s2: `return select.retrieve(form);` returns `SqlResultSet`; s3: `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve(form);`; s4: `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve(user);`; s5: `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve(user);`; s6: `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve(user);`
